title: Episode I Adventures 3: The Fury of Darth Maul
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Book |image=[[File:Adventures3.jpg]] |title=''Episode I Adventures 3:
The Fury of Darth Maul'' |author=[[Ryder Windham]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[November]] [[1999]]''Episode I Adventures 3: The Fury of Darth Maul'' |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages=96 |isbn=9780439101400 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]The first four installments of the ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]'' series form a continuous story that is set prior to the events of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] possesses the [[Scimitar/Legends|''Scimitar'']] during the series, and ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates both his acquisition of the ship and the events of ''The Phantom Menance'' to 32 BBY, thus placing the events of the first four ''Episode I Adventures'' books in 32 BBY as well. |series=''[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]'' |preceded by=''[[Episode I Adventures 2: The Bartokk Assassins]]'' |followed by=''[[Episode I Adventures 4: Jedi Emergency]]'' }} '''''Episode I Adventures 3: The Fury of Darth Maul''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] junior novel written by [[Ryder Windham]]. It is the third volume of the ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]'' series, and it was published by [[Scholastic]] in [[November]] [[1999]], with an accompanying gamebook. A sequel, [[Episode I Adventures 4: Jedi Emergency|''Jedi Emergency'']], was published the following [[December|month]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Someone has stolen something that belongs to Darth Sidious.'' ''Now he wants it back.'' ''And when a Sith Lord wants something, there's only one person he can trust to get it –'' ''Another Sith Lord.'' ==Plot summary== {{Plot}} ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Episode I Adventures 3: The Fury of Darth Maul}} ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|9780439101400}}; [[November]] [[1999]]; [[Scholastic]]; US paperback ===Cover gallery=== File:Adventures3.jpg|Novel cover
